name: ListSettlementPayments
description: List all payments included in a specific settlement. This shows which successful payments contributed to the settlement amount. Use this to see a detailed breakdown of all payment transactions that are part of a particular payout. Note: For capture-based payment methods like Klarna, use ListSettlementCaptures instead.

settlement_id.description: The ID of the settlement to retrieve payments for (e.g., 'stl_jDk30akdN').

from_.description: The payment ID to start retrieving the list from (for pagination).

limit.description: The maximum number of payments to return per page. Valid range is 1-250, defaults to 50 if not specified.

sort.description: Sort order for the results. Use 'asc' for ascending order or 'desc' for descending order (newest to oldest). Defaults to 'desc' if not specified.
